feature: Fix dark mode in meal-plan-config.tsx — 6 targeted color replacements

prompts.description: Replace all 6 hardcoded color values in meal-plan-config.tsx
prompts.prompt:
In components/meal-plan-config.tsx, make exactly these 6 color changes and nothing else:

1. Hero badge (line ~95):
   Change: `hero-badge bg-[#fff7ee] text-[#7a5b41]`
   To:     `hero-badge bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground`

2. Daily Target card container (line ~106):
   Change: `rounded-[22px] border border-[#e5d7c7] bg-[#f8f2ea] p-4`
   To:     `rounded-[22px] border border-border bg-card p-4`

3. "Daily target" label text (line ~109):
   Change: `text-[#7a5b41]`
   To:     `text-muted-foreground`

4. Accent dot span (line ~152):
   Change: `bg-[#b77749]`
   To:     `bg-muted-foreground`

5. Selected meal rhythm card — active state in the ternary (line ~173):
   Change: `border-primary bg-[#edf4ec] shadow-[0_16px_30px_-28px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)]`
   To:     `border-primary bg-primary/15 shadow-[0_16px_30px_-28px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)]`

6. Unselected meal rhythm card — idle hover state in the ternary (line ~174):
   Change: `border-border bg-card hover:border-primary/35 hover:bg-[#fcf7ef]`
   To:     `border-border bg-card hover:border-primary/35 hover:bg-secondary`

Do not change anything else — no layout, spacing, shadows, or other classes. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.
